client.label: Client

picker.intro: Choose how you'd like to place this order for {{name}}.

package.title: Package Order
package.description: Combine multiple print items (books, cards, posters…) into one order.

single.title: Individual Order
single.description: Order a single print item with full customization options.

addDocAsItem.title: Add document as item
addDocAsItem.hint: This will create a new {{type}} item referencing this document.

addItems.title: Add Items to Your Package
addItems.help: Click a product type to add it to the order.

singleType.title: What would you like to print?
singleType.help: Pick a product type to configure the order.

errors.placeOrder: Failed to place order. Please try again.

docLibrary.help: Select a saved file to use as the print file, or upload a new one below.

orderSummary.title: Order Summary
